_comment: OperationConfig descriptor for the four typed operations (Extraction / Aggregation / Histogram / Intersection). Lives on the configs-databeacon, parallel to MappingConfig and DashboardConfig. Materialized via DataBeaconSchema:EnsureSchema; mirrored in /tmp/lab-data-platform/configs/init-platform-configs.sql for fresh deployments.

Tables._comment: Operator-authored intent doc. The data-mapper bridge compiles it into a UV Operation graph based on OperationType. UV owns execution; this table only captures intent.

_notes.OperationType: One of: Extraction | Aggregation | Histogram | Intersection. The data-mapper bridge dispatches by this value at compile time.
_notes.OperationConfiguration: Type-specific JSON blob. See PLAN-PHASE-2B-Operation-Types.md §3 for the per-type shape.
_notes.TargetTable: Lake table name where the result lands. The data-mapper ensures this table on the target beacon (typically lake-databeacon) via DataBeaconSchema:EnsureSchema before the first run.
_notes.ScopeHashIndex: UNIQUE index UX_OperationConfig_ScopeHash matches the partial index in init-platform-configs.sql by name. EnsureSchema uses CREATE [UNIQUE] INDEX IF NOT EXISTS, so re-creating against an already-bootstrapped DB is a no-op.
